diagnosis: The current fresh hard-negative gate is real but too narrow: it contains 26 useful cases across two projects.

Adding third projects by direct same-interface generation has not worked: simple third-project tasks became correct-like, while more complex tasks failed the exact search/replace edit-plan materialization step.
Continuing blind API retries under the same interface would mix execution instability with source selection and would not produce a clean paper claim.

decision_options.tradeoff: weaker external validity, but no post-hoc generation-interface change
may improve third-project yield, but results cannot be merged silently with the exact edit-plan supplement attempts
does not solve fresh realistic third-project gate

recommended_next_step: Pause verifier API. Choose between a conservative two-project claim and a separately frozen new generation-interface protocol before further API calls.
